<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="256" height="256" viewBox="0 0 256 256">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Center (White) -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="10" fill="#fff"/>
  
  <!-- Petals (Red, White, Red gradient) -->
  <g transform="translate(200,200)">
    <!-- Outer petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Inner petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Gradient effect on petals -->
    <defs>
      <linearGradient id="petalGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#ff0000;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#ffffff;stop-opacity:1"/>
      </linearGradient>
    </defs>
    
    <!-- Applying gradient to outer petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Applying gradient to inner petals -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="url(#petalGrad)" opacity="0.8"/>
    
    <!-- Additional small petal details -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ff0000" opacity="0.6"/>
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.6"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="256" height="256" viewBox="0 0 256 256">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="400" fill="#000"/>

    <!-- Red Petal 2 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Yellow Petal 2 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- White Petal 3 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Red Petal 3 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Yellow Petal 3 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- White Petal 4 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Red Petal 4 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Yellow Petal 4 -->
    <path d="M-80 -80 Q-70 -90 -60 -80 T-80 -80 Z" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1"/>
  </g>

<svg width="600" height="600" viewBox="0 0 600 600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="600" height="600" fill="#000"/>
  
  <!-- Flower -->
  <g transform="translate(300,300)">
    <!-- Red petals -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="200" fill="url(#red-gradient)"/>
    
    <!-- White center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" fill="url(#white-gradient)"/>
    
    <!-- Red center -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="80" fill="#FF0000"/>
    
    <!-- Red petals -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="120" fill="url(#red-gradient)"/>
    
    <!-- White inner petals -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="140" fill="url(#white-gradient)"/>
    
    <!-- Red inner petals -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="160" fill="url(#red-gradient)"/>
    
    <!-- Gradient definitions -->
    <defs>
      <radialGradient id="red-gradient" cx="0" cy="0" r="100">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF0000;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#8B0000;stop-opacity:1"/>
      </radialGradient>
      
      <radialGradient id="white-gradient" cx="0" cy="0" r="100">
        <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FFFFFF;stop-opacity:1"/>
        <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#F0F0F0;stop-opacity:1"/>
      </radialGradient>
    </defs>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="256" height="256" viewBox="0 0 256 256">
  <!-- Black Background -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="100%" height="100%"/>
  
  <!-- Flower Base (White) -->
  <circle cx="200" cy="200" r="80" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  
  <!-- Petals (Red & White Gradient) -->
  <g transform="translate(200,200)">
    <!-- Red Outer Petal -->
    <path d="M-40,-40 Q-70,-90 -100,-120 T-130,-150 L-150,-180 Z" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Inner Red Petal -->
    <path d="M-60,-60 Q-90,-100 -120,-130 T-150,-160 L-170,-190 Z" fill="#FF0000" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="2"/>
    
    <!-- Small White Center -->
    <circle cx="-40" cy="-40" r="10" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
  </g>
  
  <!-- Stem (Green) -->
  <line x1="200" y1="200" x2="200" y2="300" stroke="#00AA00" stroke-width="10"/>
